title: Xian Wu Cangqiong
synopsis:
There are many dynasties in Yongxian Continent. Once a practitioner reaches the peak of martial arts, he will ask about the way of immortality. The young Su Yu experienced a tragedy that wiped out his family, but was unexpectedly reborn as a teenager. In order to protect his family and  relatives, Su Yu practiced the secret method of immortality he learned in his previous life, experienced hardships, kept running around, and changed his fate step by step.

(Source: iQIYI YouTube Channel)
